headline: Assessing Charter Communications (CHTR) Valuation After A Mixed One-Year And Recent Short-Term Return Profile
summary: Charter Communications stock after mixed return profile Charter Communications (CHTR) has delivered a mixed return profile, with gains over the past month and the past 3 months, but a 1-year total return that is near a 39% decline, drawing fresh attention to its current valuation and fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Charter Communications. At a share price of $232.24, Charter’s 90-day share price return of 13.23% and year-to-date share price return of 10.97% contrast sharply with a...
